name: Beef Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1/2 inch of oil in a skillet and fry the tortillas about 15 seconds on each side. Remove and pat off excess oil.
2. In a separate skillet, heat 2 tablespoons oil. Sauté onion until tender. Add chili peppers, garlic, tomato sauce, salt, and pepper. Add ground beef. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
3. Dip tortillas in egg, fill with the sauce mixture, roll, and place in a shallow greased baking dish. Pour red sauce over the tortillas, top with grated cheese, and bake uncovered at 350°F for 15 minutes.
